QueryBody: SELECT      CASE        -- A) ไม่มีส่วนลด → gross เต็ม (ไม่ลด)        WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER], 0) = 0          THEN CAST(            (($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0))              * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER])            / CAST($[$38.11.NUMBER] AS DECIMAL(19,6))            AS DECIMAL(19,6))        -- B) มีส่วนลด → gross − Dis (Exclusive)        ELSE          CAST(            (($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0))              * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]            - $[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER] )            / CAST($[$38.11.NUMBER] AS DECIMAL(19,6))            AS DECIMAL(19,6))      END

select ItemCode,ItemName,AssetSerNo
from oitm
where ItemType ='F'And validFor = 'Y'
SELECT $[$38.20.NUMBER] / 1.07

SELECT T0.[Descriptio] 
FROM OSCN T0 
WHERE T0.[Substitute] = $[$38.2.0] 
  AND T0.[CardCode] = $[$4.0.0]

SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.15.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN 0
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        OR ISNULL($[$38.11.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN 0
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0)) * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]
          * $[$38.15.NUMBER] / 100
          AS DECIMAL(19,6))
    END
